zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Poynings於1356年出生在英國哈普爾巴辛斯托可時，她的父親Lucas Poynings33歲，母親Isabelle Porter23歲。她於大約1370年與Henry de Ferrers在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1394年5月30日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Poynings于1356年出生在英国哈普爾巴辛斯托可时，她的父亲Lucas Poynings33岁，母亲Isabelle Porter23岁。她于大约1370年与Henry de Ferrers在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1394年5月30日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Poynings was born in 1356, in Basingstoke, Hampshire, England, her father, Lucas Poynings, was 33 and her mother, Isabelle Porter, was 23. She married Henry de Ferrers about 1370, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 30 May 1394, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Poynings est née en 1356, à Basingstoke, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Lucas Poynings, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Porter, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Ferrers environ 1370, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 mai 1394, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Poynings 1356 in Basingstoke, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lucas Poynings 33 und ihre Mutter Isabelle Porter 23. Sie hat um 1370 in England, United Kingdom Henry de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Mai 1394 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Poynings è nata il nel 1356 nel Basingstoke, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Lucas Poynings, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Isabelle Porter, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Ferrers circa 1370, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 maggio 1394, nel Groby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Poyningsが1356年にイギリスハンプシュアイアバシングストクで生まれた時，父Lucas Poyningsは33歳，母Isabelle Porterは23歳であった。約1370年にイギリスイギリスでHenry de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1394年5月30日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Poynings(이)가 1356년 영국 함프실르 바징스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lucas Poynings(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle Porter(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1370년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Henry de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 5월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Poynings nasceu em 1356, em Basingstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lucas Poynings, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle Porter, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Ferrers aproximadamente 1370, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de maio de 1394, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Poynings родилась в 1356 г. в местности басингсток, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lucas Poynings было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Porter, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Ferrers около 1370 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 мая 1394 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Poynings nació en 1356, en Basingstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lucas Poynings, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabelle Porter, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Henry de Ferrers aproximadamente 1370, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de mayo de 1394, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
